steps.title: Add another historical activity
steps.content: The passage first says Maya Haddad conducted more than 450 oral-history interviews. The next sentence adds that she collected photographs and artifacts representing her subjects' experiences. The transition must show addition, not restatement or contrast.

steps.title: Reject restatement and time shift
steps.content: Choice A would rephrase the interview work, but collecting photographs and artifacts is a separate activity. Choice B signals contradiction, and Choice D shifts to the present without connecting the activities. The sentence needs a transition that adds another part of Haddad's work. The answer is C.
